title: Just Cause
notes: Game stops recognising keyboard after splash screens

title: Just Cause
notes: Couldn't get past the title screen upon first starting the game. After rebooting, I got into gameplay (about 25fps) but it didn't register keyboard inputs during gameplay, rendering it unplayable.

title: Just Cause
notes: Sometimes the controls doesn't respond. To solve this you need to restart the game.

title: Just Cause
notes: Game starts up fine but then there is no keyboard or mouse input to get beyond the start-up screen.
At some moment keyboard stops working. To avoid that you must keep pushing the buttons at least every couple of seconds.
title: Just Cause

notes: Hangs on intro screen, keyboard not detected. As this runs fine with WINE in 32bit prefix a Proton option for a 32bit prefix would most likely fix it.
title: Just Cause

notes: Keyboard input often stops working and repeatedly hitting keys is necessary to get into game.
title: Just Cause

cpu: AMD A8-9600 RADEON R7, 10 COMPUTE CORES 4C+6G
notes: Appears to work perfectly however, other reports indicate controls locking up after during a long play session so, take this report with a grain of salt
title: Just Cause

notes: Keyboard not working - cannot get past "Press Enter"
title: Just Cause

notes: Same as others, no keyboard is not responsive. Other than that, runs great, at full frame-rate, even works with the widescreen patch. Sad we can't play it due to the keyboard issue.
title: Just Cause

notes:
Compared to others I have no issues with keyboard input, I can get to menus, and do things, but there are bigger issues. I can't save settings (it says "failed", but maybe it does save). And most crucially starting a new game, it simply crashes. It might be audio related, as the console is showing:

AL lib: (WW) GetSymbol: Failed to load jack_error_callback: /home/user/.local/share/Steam/ubuntu12_32/steam-runtime/i386/usr/lib/i386-linux-gnu/libjack.so.0: undefined symbol: jack_error_callback
AL lib: (WW) jack_msg_handler: Cannot connect to server socket err = No such file or directory
AL lib: (WW) jack_msg_handler: Cannot connect to server socket
AL lib: (WW) jack_msg_handler: jack server is not running or cannot be started
AL lib: (WW) ALCjackBackendFactory_init: jack_client_open() failed, 0x11
AL lib: (WW) alc_initconfig: Failed to initialize backend "jack"


That is weird, because music and sound effects in menu are working just fine.

PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 doesn't help. Changing graphic options or changing resolution doesn't help.
title: Just Cause

notes: Crashes while loading a new game.
title: Just Cause

notes: resolução maxima permitida no meu desktop foi 1280x1024 a maior resolução não funcionou
